description_long: This object consists of three elaborately decorated cakes, each with a unique theme and color palette, arranged side by side on individual trays. The leftmost cake is yellow with two tiers, topped with a gavel and coin, and adorned with a red ribbon at the base. The center cake is chocolate brown with three tiers, decorated with chocolate sticks and a pointed top, featuring red and white accents. The rightmost cake is blue with three tiers, decorated with orange and gold piping, and topped with a cannon and cannonballs. Each cake sits on a distinct tray or base, with the blue cake on a golden tray, the chocolate cake on a black and white base, and the yellow cake on a white base with a red bow. The cakes feature playful, themed decorations that evoke a whimsical, celebratory atmosphere. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, suggesting fondant or buttercream icing.
description: Three themed, multi-tiered cakes with playful decorations and vibrant colors, each displayed on its own tray. The cakes feature smooth, glossy icing and whimsical toppers like a gavel, chocolate sticks, and a cannon.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three cakes side by side, highlighting their unique toppers and colorful decorations.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the protruding toppers (gavel, chocolate sticks, cannon) and the layered structure of each cake.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the cakes, with less detail on the toppers and more focus on the tiered designs and base trays.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cakes' toppers from behind and the decorative elements extending outward.
